name: Process Flow — Laboratory Sample Processing Pipeline (8 steps with icons)
input: Show a laboratory sample processing workflow: Sample Collection (blood draw, 10mL EDTA tubes) → Centrifugation (3000 RPM, 15 min) → Aliquoting (500μL per tube) → Quality Check (hemolysis, volume verification) → DNA Extraction (Qiagen DNeasy kit) → Quantification (NanoDrop 260/280 ratio) → Normalization (50 ng/μL) → Storage (-80°C biobank).
qualityCriteria: Items present (Sample Collection, Centrifugation, Aliquoting, Quality Check, DNA Extraction, Quantification, Normalization, Storage)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Horizontal process flow with 8 cards connected by arrows, each showing a step name, brief description with technical specs, and an icon.

data.title: Laboratory Sample Processing Pipeline

items.label: Sample Collection
items.description: Blood draw into 10mL EDTA anticoagulant tubes

items.label: Centrifugation
items.description: Spin at 3000 RPM for 15 minutes to separate plasma

items.label: Aliquoting
items.description: Distribute 500μL per cryovial for individual assays

items.label: Quality Check
items.description: Assess hemolysis index and verify sample volume

items.label: DNA Extraction
items.description: Isolate genomic DNA using Qiagen DNeasy Blood kit

items.label: Quantification
items.description: Measure concentration and purity via NanoDrop 260/280

items.label: Normalization
items.description: Dilute samples to standardized 50 ng/μL concentration

items.label: Storage
items.description: Archive in -80°C biobank freezer with barcode tracking

data.caption: End-to-end workflow from blood collection to long-term biobank storage
